'''zaludhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loadage|loadage]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loadage|loadage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zaludhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zælidhith|zælidhith]] || [[word:zælidhij|zælidhij]] || [[word:zælidhish|zælidhish]] || [[word:zælidhi|zælidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zaluludhuth|zaluludhuth]] || [[word:zaluludhuj|zaluludhuj]] || [[word:zaluludhush|zaluludhush]] || [[word:zaluludhu|zaluludhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zaludhuth|zaludhuth]] || [[word:zaludhuj|zaludhuj]] || [[word:zaludhush|zaludhush]] || [[word:zaludhu|zaludhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zalufdhuth|zalufdhuth]] || [[word:zalufdhuj|zalufdhuj]] || [[word:zalufdhush|zalufdhush]] || [[word:zalufdhuf|zalufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zaludhuthu|zaludhuthu]] || [[word:zaludhuju|zaludhuju]] || [[word:zaludhushu|zaludhushu]] || [[word:zaludhuku|zaludhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zaludhuth|zaludhuth]] || [[word:zaludhuj|zaludhuj]] || [[word:zaludhush|zaludhush]] || [[word:zaludhu|zaludhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zaludhuthul|zaludhuthul]] || [[word:zaludhujul|zaludhujul]] || [[word:zaludhushul|zaludhushul]] || [[word:zaludhukul|zaludhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zaludhuthuthu|zaludhuthuthu]] || [[word:zaludhujuju|zaludhujuju]] || [[word:zaludhushushu|zaludhushushu]] || [[word:zaludhuku|zaludhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zaludhuthun|zaludhuthun]] || [[word:zaludhujun|zaludhujun]] || [[word:zaludhushun|zaludhushun]] || [[word:zaludhukun|zaludhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zaludhuthuoro|zaludhuthuoro]] || [[word:zaludhujuoro|zaludhujuoro]] || [[word:zaludhushuoro|zaludhushuoro]] || [[word:zaludhukuoro|zaludhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
